security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:8787 ws://127.0.0.1:8787 ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' data: blob:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:

bundle.shortDescription: Your agent organization, on your machine
bundle.longDescription: AULAR runs a team of AI agents on your own computer, on your own model key. They delegate work to each other, hold a shared roadmap, and keep working while you watch.
